summary: Full regression on SynCoop after UX refresh for nelayan (mobile-first). Backend pytest: 43/43 PASS (auth, membership, vessels, transactions, quota, fish prices/calc, admin users, dashboard, notifications, fish-sales CASH + POTONG_UTANG). Frontend mobile 390x844: all 4 demo role logins reach /dashboard; NELAYAN home cards (home-quota-card, home-debt-card, home-fish-prices, quick-sales, quick-vessels, membership-banner) render; bottom-nav present with all tabs functional (bottomnav-fish-sales and bottomnav-more required JS click due to Emergent badge overlay in bottom-right — expected, not a bug); more-sheet exposes sheet-calculator/membership/notifications + Keluar button; Calculator flow (fish-chip → quick-kg-{1,5,10,25} → calc-submit → calc-result) works with visible net income + coop cut breakdown; other nelayan pages show correct Indonesian headings (Jatah Solar Saya, Utang Saya, Penjualan Ikan Saya, Kartu Anggota). Desktop 1920x800: sidebar visible with full menu, bottom-nav hidden. logout-btn-mobile returns to /login.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right of viewport overlaps bottomnav-more and bottomnav-fish-sales, intercepting pointer events. Real users tap through the badge area rarely, but consider adding right padding to bottom-nav or z-index adjustment. Playwright must use JS click to bypass — as noted in test brief.

action_items: Optional: shift Emergent badge or increase bottom-nav right-side padding so bottomnav-more/fish-sales aren't overlapped by the badge in the preview environment.
critical_code_review_comments: Calculator: calc-submit is correctly disabled when fishId or weight is empty; loading state (busy) prevents double submit — good.
Dashboard NelayanHome: prices.slice(0,5) hard-limits fish prices — acceptable UX cap.
Layout.js: bottom nav renders in mobile-only container (lg:hidden) — desktop sidebar correctly exclusive.
No console errors observed during nelayan flow.
seed_data_creation: None new; used pre-seeded nelayan@demo.syncoop.id account with 4 vessels + 1 outstanding DP (visible in desktop screenshot).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New NelayanHome (Dashboard.js) + mobile Layout bottom-nav + more-sheet + Calculator revamp all working. Backend unchanged from prior 43/43 baseline. If retesting bottom-nav on mobile viewport, always use page.evaluate JS click for bottomnav-more and bottomnav-fish-sales — 'Made with Emergent' badge overlays them at bottom-right in preview environment.
